mechanism: Hidden leverage (5.5-7.5x true vs 4.0-4.5x reported) increases the probability of credit downgrades that push CLO CCC-bucket utilization above the 7.5% contractual threshold, triggering the non-linear amplification cascade of forced selling and market closure.
regime_dependence: Latent risk that crystallizes when growth slows or Kalecki support diminishes. PIK toggle usage rising from 2% to 5-8% is the leading indicator. Current CCC utilization (4% vs 6.5%) determines proximity.
